title: spirits in Sylvania Station store room spirits
publication_or_organisation: Hungry spirits haunt station store room; ABC Rural
australian_relation: ABC Rural public article with a distinct Western Australian pastoral-station spirit account from Sylvania Station.
evidence_summary: ABC Rural reported that Western Australia's remote pastoral stations can be spooky places. Darlene, the cook at Sylvania Station in WA's Pilbara region, said she often hears music around the homestead and described two guys there: very nice spirits in blue shirts who hang out in her store room and usually sit up on top.
